channel.title: Notice board | Unimi
channel.description: General notice board of the University of Milan "La Statale"

item.title: VISA applicants language proficiency
item.description: In accordance with ministerial guidelines, visa applicants are required to demonstrate a B2 level of proficiency in either Italian or English in order to obtain a study visa. The required language must correspond to the language of instruction of the degree programme.%0A

item.title: Virgilio Program 2026/27 - Student ranking
item.description: On 4 May 2026, the Selection Committee reviewed all applications received in response to the 2026/27 Call for Applications for the Virgilio program. %0AThe final ranking, including the names of the 10 selected applicants, is provided below.%0A%0A📄 Virgilio Program 2026/27 - Student ranking

item.title: Maker Faire Rome: applications open until 30 June 2026
item.description: Applications are now open for Maker Faire Rome, the exhibition that celebrates the most innovative projects from public universities and research institutes.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: Call for admissions to Collegio di Milano - a. y. 2026-2027
University Library Service – spring course calendar 2026
item.description: The list of courses offered by the University Library Service in spring 2026 is now online. These courses focus on the use of databases, and are open to the entire University community.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it
